details.title: A Way Back Home
details.description:
A way back home is a platformer in which you have to ˜ connect ˜ your way back home by collecting all the crystals in each level to build a bridge that takes you closer to your goal.Use arrows to move and space to jump.Made with Godot by Jaqueline Santos and Bruno Tabor for the New Year, New Skills game jam.Credits:
Character: BrullovSong: Spencer_YKCrystal sound effect: PixabayBridge sound effect: SergeQuadrado

game.short_text: A short gothic pixel game where you connect the living and the dead.
game.title: Tethering Faith

details.title: Tethering Faith
details.description:
Tethering Faith is a short 2D side scroller puzzle and narrative driven gothic pixel game. Set in a post apocalyptic world with fantasy elements,  you follow the story of Aveline; the last vessel of her god's will. 
Using her unique ability to connect the living and the dead, Aveline without knowing must determine the fate of her realm. 
┌─ ･｡ﾟ: ∘◦☾◦∘｡ﾟ. ─┐
❝ 「 He has willed it, and it is so. 」❞

└─ ･｡ﾟ: ∘◦☾◦∘｡ﾟ. ─┘
══════ ✝ { Controls } ✝ ══════ 

[ X ] To interact 
[ Space ] To Jump
➥ Hold space bar to jump higher. 
Click it again to double jump and hold for height
[ F11 ] Full Screen

══════ ✝ { Features } ✝ ══════ 
➥  Original Sound Track 
➥  4 Unique locations 
➥  10+ unique NPCs
➥  Choices that matter
➥  2 Endings 

══════ ✝ { Development } ✝ ══════ 
 ◦☾◦ Programmers ◦☾◦
Franco Yudica and Lucas 'Koso' Moyano
◦☾◦ Artist ◦☾◦

Solace

Dax  and  Seth Monyette


 。　☆　　　ﾟ ＊  ¸ .　    ✦˖　      ° :   ﹢ 　   ˖ . •　 .　﹢˖✦

This was a game made for New Year, New Skills Game Jam and everything for this project was made within a week! As well as that, this is everyones first Game Jam. If you want us to make this into a full game please let us know!
Any feedback is greatly welcome and thank you for checking out our page!

details.title: The Tome
details.description:
My name is Detective Williams for the New York City Police Department. I was sent to solve a case of potentially connected murders. 
Four people were murdered in a trailer park in the outbacks of Albany. My orders are to gather any evidence relating to The Cult, and find any possible motivations.
The Tome is a PSX-style horror game with an emphasis on exploration and atmosphere.

Submission of New Years, New Skills game jam.
Programming:
pulp_dev
Level design and story:
dagon_gd
pulp_dev
Sound Effects:
SnakeWig
Music:
Kzarkses

Horror Free SFX by YourPalRob
Architecture Kit by Comp-3 Interactive
Max Damage's Low Poly Zombie
Essential Series NOX SOUND
Trailer Park by Elbolilloduro
SBS Tiny Texture Pack by All Screaming Brain Studios
PSX Style Cars by GGBot
Made in Godot Engine

details.title: Underground Apartment
details.description:
Welcome to Underground Apartment, the home for critters of all kinds.
Build your own 3 star apartment for cute animals!
Made for New Year, New Skills Game Jam 2024
🎮Control🎮
right click to cancel build
scroll down using the mouse wheel or hold right mouse and drag for more room.
(there are 99 room slots available, and buildings cannot be removed, so plan ahead to build that luxury apartment)

game.short_text: Charm your way through the beach and flirt with plenty of various dudes with your limited deck of words!
game.title: Flirter, Not a Fighter

details.title: Flirter, Not a Fighter
details.description:
VERSION 1.0.0.4
====================================================
HOW TO PLAY:
- WASD to move
- Make phrases for every encounter (bad phrases are also accepted)
- Stay alive until the end!
====================================================

OVERVIEW

Charm your way through the beach and flirt with plenty of various dudes with your limited deck of words!
MEET DUDES ON THE BEACH
- Connect with various (most often stereotypical, oops) beach boys and see them in action!

TALK YOUR WAY TO VICTORY

- Fighting with your fists is not an option. Words are the way to the heart in this game!

FAST-PACED PHRASE BUILDING ACTION

- The clock is ticking, better think quick before people give you a knuckle sandwich!

moreInfo.Rating: Rated 4.3 out of 5 stars(3 total ratings)
moreInfo.Tags: 2D, beach, Deck Building, Godot, phrase, phrase-builder, Robots, Side Scroller

details.title: 'RIFT' Electric
details.description:
'RIFT' Electric is a first person puzzle game where you take a questionable job listing  and must enter strange homes to turn off all the lights. Using a lens that reveals hidden objects and electrical connections, you must figure how the rooms are wired to escape safely.


ControlButtonMovementWASDInteract'E' or Left MouseToggle Lens'Q' or Right MouseElectrical Gates ManualTab (Hold)

game.short_text: A world has fallen to totalitarianism. You control a machine from that world.
game.title: PRECEPT

details.title: PRECEPT
details.description:
This is a very short game about you, and what you can do.
Downloading recommended for the best experience.

This game was made in 7 days for the New Year, New Skills Game Jam.
I made all of the models, sounds and textures, did all the programming, visuals and level design.

WASD to move
SPACE to jump
Left Mouse Button to grab
P to pause the game
I highly encourage speedrunners to try and speedrun it, because it's the most fun I've had with the game.

LEADERBOARD:
1st place: Lizardlike, time: 1:33 (developer)
2nd place: SumOfAllN00bs, time: 1:34
3rd place: Charlie257318, time: 1:39


PS: The web version is very buggy and much weaker in comparison to the PC version in many ways. Sorry about any problems with performance. Download the .zip fileExtract the filesOpen PRECEPT.exe

game.short_text: Dio's journey! He can't turn back now!
game.title: Dio Can't Connect!

details.title: Dio Can't Connect!
details.description:
Controls:
ESC - pause menu
A,D - left and right
Space - jump / jump off wire
Left Mouse Button , E - grab things
R - let go of said grabbed things
My first game! This was originally submitted for the Bitter Sails New Year, New Skills Game Jam! In this you place as Dio the diode. On his tricky journey he must connect to sources that will unlock his path forward.
Music:
Leap - nene (https://opengameart.org/content/leap-8bit) 
All other assets are done by myself !
Just a heads up! My Personal Best  is 24.071. Good luck!
Thanks for playing :)

game.short_text: Do you believe in free will?
game.title: Project Memento (Demo)

details.title: Project Memento (Demo)
details.description:
“Do you believe in free will?”

Project Memento is a psychological horror game where you wake up without memory in a strange apartment. With no idea what lies outside and with the main door being mysteriously blocked, you must navigate through the eerie environment to uncover the truth. As you delve deeper into the apartment's dark corners, you realize that something lurks within. Would you be able to recover your memory and find the truth?

Project Memento was developed as part of the New Year, New Skills Game Jam, in just 7 days, by a team of five artists and developers following the theme "building connections".

Team Roles:

Role
Name
Management & Game DesignJorge NaderGameplay & Narrative
Lindsey Vanthorn, Aixa Turlan and Jorge NaderProgramming & Level Design
Mykola Kozoriz and Jorge NaderArt
Lindsey Vanthorn 
Music & Sound
Ne4a


Our 2D art was made by the talented Lindsey Vanthorn. To learn more about her work, visit  here


All the music in this game was composed by Ne4a. To check out more of Ne4a's impressive work, visit here



Contact the developers at:

Jorge Nader: LinkedIn

Aixa Turlan: LinkedIn

Mykola Kozoriz: LinkedIn


Controls:
Movement: WASD
Interact with objects: E
Interact with dialog: Left click

SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS:

- Relatively modern dedicated graphics cardDownload the zip file and unzip it to a folder of your choiceNavigate to the 'Windows' folder you just unzipped
Double click the "memento" executable file with a black icon

game.short_text: Quickly plant and grow those vegetables to deliver those farming connections!
game.title: Overcropped

details.title: Overcropped
details.description: Overcropped is a fast-paced repeating farming game, where you try to deliver to other farming companies in hopes that you build the connections needed to build your farming empire!The game is lacking many features that the team tried, but as mostly all first time jammers, we are proud of our creation!Check out the source code at: https://github.com/Bratah123/NewYearNewSkillsJamWe greatly appreciate you for playing and giving our game a chance!Lead:PeterProgrammers: https://ragnaorok.itch.io/https://angietea.itch.io/https://bratah123.itch.io/Artist:https://deltzio.itch.io/Drag the contents of the zip, and run the exe!

game.short_text: Attempt a ritual using the Sinister Tarots to build a connection with the demon Kaalub, the Oracle of Obsessions.
game.title: Kaalub

details.title: Kaalub
details.description:
Through a mediumistic ritual with the Sinister Tarots, we will build a connection with the demon Kaalub, "Oracle of Obsessions". 
Kaalub will grant the privilege of obtaining divination on any question to anyone who completes the ritual correctly.She will devour a thought, idea or ambition instead, every time the Tarot user fails the occult process until his mind is completely drained.
This game was created in 7 days, for the Game Jam  New Year New SkillsGame assets, visuals and design: @KyaraGame music and SFX: @IcaroSirioGame Dev: @MatteoRichardGaudino
